The former Major League Baseball player who worked on the same broadcast team as Kim Kelch is **Chris Speier**. 

Chris Speier was the Bench Coach for the Washington Nationals and worked on the broadcast team for the Nationals. Kim Kelch is a broadcaster for the Cincinnati Reds, and both are part of the broadcast team for their respective teams. 

**Shared position**: None explicitly mentioned, but Chris Speier is the Bench Coach, while Kim Kelch is a broadcaster. There is no direct position shared between them in the context.
